info.title: Traigent API - Results Operations
info.description: Endpoints for retrieving and analyzing experiment results

get.description: Retrieve a list of all experiment results with optional filtering

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

error.example: The requested resource was not found

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific result

get.summary: List all results for an experiment
get.description: Retrieve aggregated results across all runs for an experiment

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort results by field (can be a specific metric name or timestamp)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter criteria for parameters or metrics

get.description: Retrieve the best performing configurations based on specified metrics

parameters.name: optimization
parameters.description: Whether to maximize or minimize the metric

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top results to return

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter criteria for parameters or metrics

post.description: Directly compare metrics between multiple specific configurations

metrics.description: Specific metrics to compare (if empty, all metrics are compared)

404.description: One or more configurations not found

get.description: Analyze correlations between parameters and metrics

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Specific parameters to analyze (if empty, all parameters are analyzed)

parameters.name: metrics
parameters.description: Specific metrics to analyze (if empty, all metrics are analyzed)

get.description: Export results in various formats (CSV, JSON, etc.)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter criteria for parameters or metrics

get.summary: List results for a specific run
get.description: Retrieve results for a specific experiment run

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort results by field (can be a specific metric name or timestamp)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter criteria for parameters or metrics

post.description: Record metrics and results for a specific configuration

configuration_id.description: ID of the configuration this result is for

artifacts.description: References to result artifacts (files, images, etc.)

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific result

delete.description: Delete a specific result and its associated resources

get.description: Download a specific artifact associated with a result
